headline: Edison International Honors 30 Students With 2026 Edison Scholars Awards
summary: ROSEMEAD, Calif., April 08, 2026--Edison International is recognizing 30 high school seniors as 2026 Edison Scholars. Announced through surprise school visits over the past two weeks, each student will receive a $50,000 scholarship to help pay for college as they pursue careers in STEM (science, technology, engineering and math).

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks during market turbulence. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings and news on high-yielding utility stocks.
